revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Respond|minus|{{{1|Closing without action}}}|alt=no}}<noinclude>{{documentation|content={{Template:Resolved mark/doc |type=checkmark|where=at [[Wikipedia:Sockpuppet investigations]] to indicate that a case has been reviewed and determined to not be actionable. |para=The template accepts a single parameter (unnamed or given as {{para|1}}) that changes the phrase "Closing without action" to the text specified in the parameter. {{pb}}{{tlx|cwa}} may be used as a shortcut.}}}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Closing_without_action here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Closing_without_action for full history.
